name: sonar-manage-findings-skill
description: Codex skill for inspecting and triaging SonarCloud and SonarQube findings.

scripts.publish:local: npm run release:verify && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:verify: npm run validate && npm run test && npm run pack:dry-run
scripts.check:python: npm run lint:python && npm run typecheck:python && npm run test:python && npm run compile:python
scripts.check:python:unsafe: npm run lint:python:unsafe && npm run typecheck:python && npm run test:python && npm run compile:python
scripts.format:python: npm run ruff:format && npm run ruff:fix
scripts.lint:python: npm run ruff:check && npm run ruff:format:check
scripts.lint:python:unsafe: npm run ruff:check:unsafe && npm run ruff:fix:unsafe
scripts.python:venv: python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\activate && python -m pip install --upgrade pip && python -m pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
